title: Cobblemon : Simple Pokecenter's
description: Add pokemon centers with healing machine and pc.
body:
Attention : I'm already working on the chest loots, and on the new update that will bring 5 new chests to the game.

Cobblemon : Simple Pokecenter's

◽ Functional versions (With cobblemon): 1.20.1 / 1.21.1
◽ Decorative versions: 1.21.2 / 1.21.3 / 1.21.4

◽ Have you ever been in the middle of a journey and had nowhere to heal your pokemons?
◽ This is a simple mod that adds a pokemon center with some berries, a healing machine and a computer.

◽ To configure the spawn distance between buildings, you must open the mod's “Jar” file, go to -> data/cobblemon_simple_center/worldgen/structure_set/pokecenter.json.  Inside it, change ‘spacing’ and “separation.”

◽ To configure the biomes where the building will appear, you will need to open the mod's “Jar” file, go to -> data/cobblemon_simple_center/tags/worldgen/biome/has_structure/pokecenter.json. Inside it, change the biomes according to the tags, for example #c:is_forest.

My other mods: 

Create : Cobblemon Industries                                   

Cobblemon: Weapons, Armors & Tools                       

Cobblemon : Poke Labs

Cobblemon : Botany Pots

Cobblemore Lib
